reasoning: The probability of Russia intentionally launching a military offensive to gain territorial control of Finland by the end of 2025 is astronomically low. The knowledge cutoff is October 26, 2025, leaving only about two months in the year. Finland is a full member of NATO, meaning any such action would invoke Article 5 and trigger a direct conflict with the entire alliance. Furthermore, Russia’s conventional forces remain heavily engaged in Ukraine and would lack the operational capacity to open a new major front in Scandinavia without a massive, highly visible mobilization that has not occurred. The Polymarket price of 2% in mid-October 2025 acts as a floor, reflecting the minimum tick size and long-shot tail risk rather than a genuine expectation. Thus, a probability of 0.02 is virtually a confident prediction of NO.
